ServiceDefinition.description:
creates the user groups and assigns them to the OU. See Roles and Rights document.
[region][.subRegion].UC[ucId].[companyName].LOC[locId].[locationName]
ServiceDefinition.name: GenerateUserGroups

ServiceDefinition.description:
creates the user groups and assigns them to the OU. See Roles and Rights document.
[region][.subRegion].UC[ucId].[companyName].LOC[locId].[locationName]
ServiceDefinition.name: SetRolesAndRightsForAssets
